premise: My son, whom I raised alone on night shifts, convinced me to co-sign a $240,000 mortgage for his 'starter home,' then stopped paying, sold it at a $90,000 profit, and told everyone I was a greedy leech. At 58, I went back to school, became a financial paralegal, found a hidden bank account, and garnished his wages until I recovered every cent plus 10% interest.

thumb.label: Thumbnail + metadata
thumb.detail: My Son Tricked Me Into A $240K Mortgage, Sold It, Called Me A Leech. So I Garnis
